plist.dict:
Label com.example.marketdashboard.update
``` ProgramArguments
/path/to/python3 /path/to/scripts/update_market_data.py
EnvironmentVariables
HOME /Users/your-username
StartCalendarInterval
Hour 16 Minute 30
StandardOutPath /path/to/logs/market_dashboard_update.log
StandardErrorPath /path/to/logs/market_dashboard_update_error.log ```
